clean_clone_contract.ordinary_clone: must contain all current required evidence binaries

rollback: Restore the last checksum-bound publication package and manifests; rerun clean-room validation.
known_limitations: Exact duplicate accepted-run ZIPs remain in case-local and accepted-run indexes.
No real remote asset retrieval was executed because no current artifact is assigned external storage.
Historical Git-object size cannot be measured from a ZIP publication package without the repository .git directory.
